allowed_actions: Only actions in the future signed hermetic case scope.
contamination_rules: Independent sessions, filesystems, target copies, and no shared notes.
Withhold findings, reports, PoCs, progress, case memory, and judge packets until outputs freeze.
exclusion_rules: Any historical case or lesson that informed Decision 0005.
Any case requiring shared live state or contact with an old target.
inclusion_rules: Sealed local known-truth cases not used to design Decision 0005.
Pinned target identity and hermetic signed scope available before assignment.
root_cause_deduplication: Deduplicate by mechanism, reachability boundary, and oracle-distinct root cause.
safety_stops: Stop on scope drift, identity drift, cleanup debt, secret-shaped content, or any Zone-2 step without fresh confirmation.
